description:
Return a list of all Custom Field Lov Entries associated with the Current Company and the Custom Field Definition passed by path param.
The filter `filters[active]` is ignored when `filters[id]` is present.

parameters.name: custom_field_definition_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Custom Field Definition.

parameters.name: filters[start_with]
parameters.description: return lov entries that label start with letters

parameters.name: filters[active]
parameters.description: return lov entries that active status is (true or false)

parameters.name: filters[label_with]
parameters.description: return lov entries that contains the label with the text

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: return lov entries that are filtered on an array of ID's. Example: filters[id]=[1,2]
